resources.string: Welcome to Popular Movies App! Discover the most popular and highest-rated movies from The Movie Database (TMDb).

Usage:
• Browse the grid to see movie posters.
• Tap a movie for more details.
• Use the menu to sort by popularity or ratings.
TMDb API Key is missing. Please add \'tmdb.api.key\' to your local.properties file.
Failed to fetch movies. Please check your connection or try again.
No internet connection. Please check your network.
